{"file_path":"/home/runner/.claude/plans/giggly-hatching-papert.md","content":"# Task Classification: P1T03 — HIGH Complexity Auth Migration

## Task Summary

Replace the entire session-based authentication system with JWT-based authentication. Migrate the user schema to include `jwt_secret`, `exp`, and `iat` fields. Add RBAC with admin/editor/viewer roles. Update all API routes to use the new auth middleware. Run database migrations.

---

## Context

The codebase has **two auth systems coexisting** — already flagged as an inconsistency in project memory:

- **`src/auth/session-store.ts` + `src/auth/user-store.ts`** (SHA-256 hashing) — used by `src/api/auth/login.ts` and `src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts`. SessionStore manages tokens in-memory with a generation counter. UserStore uses SHA-256 for password hashing with in-memory storage.
- **`src/auth/auth-service.ts` + `src/auth/jwt-service.ts`** (PBKDF2 hashing) — the preferred pattern per conventions. `auth-service.ts`… [+4151 chars]
